content_en: Allah guarantees that He will admit the mujahid in His Way into Paradise if he is killed, or else He will return him safely to his home with rewards and booty."21 Ibn Umar related that the Prophet said, "Whenever you enter into a loan transaction and hold on to the tails of your oxen and are content with being a farmer and give up jihad in the Way of Allah, then Allah will let disgrace prevail over you and He will not withdraw it until you return to your deen."22 The Merits of Martyrdom in the Way of Allah Anas related that the Prophet said, "Nobody who dies and finds good from Allah (in the akhira) wants to return to this world - even if he were to be given the whole world and what is in it - except for a martyr who, on seeing the excellence of being a martyr, wants to come back to this world and be killed again (in the Way of Allah)."23 Abu Hurairah related that the Prophet said, "By Him in Whose hand my soul is, I would like to fight jihad in the Way of Allah and be killed, and then fight jihad in the Way of Allah and be killed, and then fight jihad in the Way of Allah and be killed."24 'Abdullah Ibn Amr Ibn al-'As related that the Prophet said, "All the wrong actions of a shahid are forgiven except debt."25 16 Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, 6/4; Muslim, 13/24-25. 17 Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, 6/ 6; Muslim, 13 /33-34. 18 Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, 6/13; Muslim, 13/ 27. 19 Muslim, 13/61; Al-Tirmidhi, 7/162; Al-Nasa'i', 6/39. 20 Muslim, 13/56; Abu Dawud, 2485; Al-Nasa'i', 6/8. 21 Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, 6/ 6; Muslim, 13 /20; Al-Nasa'i, 6/ 20; Imam Malik's Al-Muwatta', 1/443-444. 22 Abu Dawud, 3445. 23 Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, 6/ 32; Muslim, 13/ 24; Al-Tirmidhi, 7/161. 24 Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, 6/16; Muslim, 13/20. 25 Muslim, 13 /30. For the wrong actions of a martyr to be forgiven, his jihad should be sincerely in the Way of Allah, seeking the reward of Allah. Abu Qatadah related that the Messenger of Allah stood up among his companions and gave a talk in which he told them that jihad in the Way of Allah and trust in Allah are the most excellent of actions. A man stood up and said, "Messenger of Allah, do you think that if I am killed in the Way of Allah all my wrong actions will be wiped out for me?" The Messenger of Allah replied, "Yes, if you are killed in the Way of Allah and you were always steadfast and sincere and you always fought facing the enemy and never turned your back on him." Then he added, 'What did you just say?" The man asked, "Do you think that if I am killed in the Way of Allah all my wrong actions will be wiped out for me?" The Messenger of Allah said, "Yes, if you were steadfast and sincere and always fought facing the enemy and never turned your back on him - except for debt. Jibril has just told me this."26 Al-Miqdam Ibn Ma'd Yakrib related that the Prophet said, "The martyr receives six good things from Allah: he is forgiven at the first shedding of his blood; he is shown his abode in Paradise; he is preserved from the punishment in the grave; he is kept safe from the Greatest Terror; he has placed on his head a crown of honour, a ruby of which is better than the world and what it contains; he is married to seventy-two wives of the maidens with large dark eyes; and he is made intercessor for seventy of his relatives."27 A man asked the Prophet "O Messenger of Allah! Why is it that all the believers are tried in their graves except the martyr?" The Prophet replied: "The head of the martyr is protected by the gleam of swords."28 The Jihad of the Companions Anas related, "My uncle Anas Ibn An-Nadr missed the battle of Badr. He said, 'O Messenger of Allah! I missed the first battle you fought against the kafirun but if Allah gives me a chance to fight the kafirun, there is no doubt that Allah will see how (bravely) I will fight.' On the day of Uhud when the Muslims turned their backs and fled, he said, '0 Allah! I apologise to You for what they have done, and I denounce what these (i.e. the kafirun) have done.' Then he advanced and Sa'd Ibn Muadh met him. He said, 'O Sa'd Ibn Muadh! By the Lord of An-Nadr, Paradise! I can smell its scent coming out from Uhud.' Later on Sa'd said, 'O Messenger of Allah!
content_id:
Allah menjamin bahwa Dia akan memasukkan mujahid di jalan-Nya ke dalam Surga jika ia terbunuh, atau Dia akan mengembalikannya dengan selamat ke rumahnya dengan pahala dan rampasan perang." Ibnu Umar RA meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Kapan pun kamu memasuki transaksi utang dan berpegang pada ekor lembu-lembu kamu dan merasa puas menjadi petani dan meninggalkan jihad di jalan Allah, maka Allah akan membiarkan kehinaan merajalela atas kamu dan Dia tidak akan mencabutnya sampai kamu kembali kepada agamamu."

Keutamaan Syahadah di Jalan Allah — Anas RA meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada orang yang meninggal dan mendapatkan kebaikan dari Allah (di akhirat) yang ingin kembali ke dunia ini — bahkan jika diberi seluruh dunia beserta isinya — kecuali seorang syahid yang, setelah melihat kemuliaan menjadi syahid, ingin kembali ke dunia ini dan terbunuh lagi (di jalan Allah)." Abu Hurairah RA meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, aku ingin berperang jihad di jalan Allah dan terbunuh, kemudian berperang jihad di jalan Allah dan terbunuh, kemudian berperang jihad di jalan Allah dan terbunuh." Abdullah ibn Amr ibn al-'Ash RA meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Semua dosa seorang syahid diampuni kecuali utang."

Agar dosa-dosa seorang syahid diampuni, jihadnya harus benar-benar di jalan Allah, mengharapkan pahala dari Allah. Abu Qatadah RA meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berdiri di antara para sahabatnya dan berbicara kepada mereka bahwa jihad di jalan Allah dan tawakal kepada Allah adalah amal-amal yang paling utama. Seorang laki-laki berdiri dan berkata: "Rasulullah, menurutmu jika aku terbunuh di jalan Allah apakah semua dosaku akan dihapus dariku?" Rasulullah ﷺ menjawab: "Ya, jika kamu terbunuh di jalan Allah dan kamu selalu teguh dan ikhlas serta selalu berperang menghadap musuh dan tidak pernah membelakanginya." Kemudian beliau menambahkan: "Apa yang baru saja kamu katakan?" Laki-laki itu bertanya: "Menurutmu jika aku terbunuh di jalan Allah apakah semua dosaku akan dihapus dariku?" Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ya, jika kamu teguh dan ikhlas dan selalu berperang menghadap musuh dan tidak pernah membelakanginya — kecuali utang. Jibril baru saja memberitahu aku ini."

Al-Miqdam ibn Ma'd Yakrib RA meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Syahid menerima enam kebaikan dari Allah: ia diampuni pada tetesan pertama darahnya; ia diperlihatkan tempat tinggalnya di Surga; ia terlindungi dari azab kubur; ia aman dari Ketakutan Terbesar; di kepalanya diletakkan mahkota kehormatan, yang yaqutnya lebih baik dari dunia beserta isinya; ia dinikahkan dengan tujuh puluh dua bidadari; dan ia dijadikan pemberi syafaat bagi tujuh puluh kerabatnya." Seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: "Wahai Rasulullah! Mengapa semua orang beriman diuji di kubur mereka kecuali syahid?" Nabi ﷺ menjawab: "Kepala syahid dilindungi oleh kilatan pedang."

Jihad Para Sahabat — Anas RA meriwayatkan: "Pamanku Anas ibn an-Nadr tidak ikut dalam Perang Badar. Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah! Aku ketinggalan pertempuran pertama yang engkau lakukan melawan kaum kafir, tetapi jika Allah memberiku kesempatan untuk berperang melawan kaum kafir, tidak diragukan lagi bahwa Allah akan melihat (seberapa berani) aku berperang.' Pada hari Uhud ketika kaum Muslim membalikkan punggung mereka dan melarikan diri, ia berkata: 'Ya Allah! Aku memohon maaf kepada-Mu atas apa yang telah mereka lakukan, dan aku mengecam apa yang telah mereka (yaitu kaum kafir) lakukan.' Kemudian ia maju dan bertemu Sa'd ibn Mu'adz. Ia berkata: 'Wahai Sa'd ibn Mu'adz! Demi Tuhan an-Nadr, Surga! Aku bisa mencium aromanya yang berasal dari Uhud.' Kemudian Sa'd berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah!
